page: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results indicate strong memory performance, with the PassMark memory score placing in the top 10% tier. Large-block memory bandwidth is also strong, reaching 223.45 GB/sec for read-only and 117.55 GB/sec for write operations. Single-core CPU performance is strong, as demonstrated by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests, while multi-core CPU performance and database operations fall within the average range. The instance also shows strong performance in bzip3 decompression and small-model LLM inference.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the r3-128 offers qualitative resource efficiency for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of shared-core configurations. The combination of 128 GB of RAM and local NVMe storage makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, caching layers, and text processing tasks.
description: The OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, and includes a 400 GB NVMe SSD for local storage. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights top-tier memory performance, with PassMark memory scores in the top 10% and strong large-block memory read/write bandwidth. Single-core CPU performance is also strong, while multi-core execution and database operations remain average. This resource profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads, making the r3-128 well-suited for database hosting, caching layers, text processing, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-128 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier memory performance for databases and memory-bound workloads.
